context.description: CharacterSheet._prepareContext (gated on _gameSystemId === 'ow') must build an `ordersPanel` context object with two arrays. `available` is the three GENERIC_ORDERS resolved through canIssueOrder() — each entry: { orderId, nameKey, effectKey, actionCostKey, actionCost, canIssue, blockReasonKey }. `sweepingActive` is system.activeOrders.filter(o => o.sweeping) mapped to { orderId, nameKey, effectKey, appliedCount }. The orchestrator should reuse GENERIC_ORDER_I18N / ACTION_COST_KEY / KIND_KEY / BLOCK_REASON_KEY maps already exported (constants are duplicated as private in ow-orders-actions.ts; promote to shared module when wiring if desired).
